code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut current = ""
mut have_max = false
mut have_min = false
mut max_val = 0
mut min_val = 0

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

while i <= n
  let at_end = i == n
  mut is_space = false
  if at_end
    is_space = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      is_space = is_ws(b)
    when None
      is_space = true
    end
  end

  if is_space
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        if not have_max
          max_val = v
          min_val = v
          have_max = true
          have_min = true
        else
          if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
          if v < min_val
            min_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("max=#{max_val}")
println("min=#{min_val}")
